## Summary
Sample: Create a new Episodes table in Supabase as part of integrating Supabase with the application backend.

## Tasks
- Sample: The required Episodes table fields: id (PK), title, content, created_at, updated_at
- Sample: Set up the Episodes table in Supabase via migration file
- Sample: Connect the application to Supabase

## Acceptance Criteria
- Sample: Episodes table is created and visible in Supabase
- Sample: Make sure to run migration file

## Out of Scope
- Sample: Running CD to execute the migration file is out of scope
